notes: This dataset index merges the tv8 and se8 PCA16 waveform-code upper-bound packages into the same full5 review slice.
This remains an analysis-only upper-bound consumer route because the waveform_pca_code is fitted from target waveform references inside each packet export.
Use this index for bounded Stage5 consumer smoke and machine-side comparison only, not as a deployable student route.
